title: 2026-01-05 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 14.19
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-01-05: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 14.19/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-01-05, the score printed 14.19/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
